aws.name: Resources tagged with DR plan metadata
aws.expected: Critical resources tagged with contingency plan identifiers
aws.remediation: Tag critical resources with DR/contingency plan metadata.

azure.name: Resources tagged with DR plan metadata
azure.expected: Critical resources tagged with contingency plan identifiers
azure.remediation: Tag critical resources with DR/contingency plan metadata in Azure.

gcp.name: Resources labeled with DR plan metadata
gcp.expected: Critical resources labeled with contingency plan identifiers
gcp.remediation: Label critical resources with DR/contingency plan metadata in GCP.

aws.name: AWS Resilience Hub assessments completed
aws.expected: Recent resilience assessments exist showing DR testing results
aws.remediation: Use AWS Resilience Hub to test and document DR plan testing.

azure.name: Azure Site Recovery test failover documented
azure.expected: Test failover completed within required timeframe
azure.remediation: Perform and document test failovers in Azure Site Recovery.

gcp.name: Disaster recovery test documented in Cloud Logging
gcp.expected: DR test logs exist showing recent testing activity
gcp.remediation: Document DR testing activities in Cloud Logging.

aws.name: S3 buckets have cross-region replication enabled
aws.expected: Critical S3 buckets replicate to alternate region
aws.remediation: Enable cross-region replication for critical S3 buckets.

aws.name: RDS databases have cross-region read replicas
aws.expected: Critical RDS instances have read replicas in alternate regions
aws.remediation: Configure cross-region read replicas for critical RDS databases.

azure.name: Storage accounts have geo-redundant replication
azure.expected: Critical storage accounts use GRS or GZRS replication
azure.remediation: Enable geo-redundant storage (GRS/GZRS) for critical storage accounts.

azure.name: SQL databases have geo-replication configured
azure.expected: Critical SQL databases have active geo-replication
azure.remediation: Configure active geo-replication for critical Azure SQL databases.

gcp.name: Cloud Storage buckets use multi-region or dual-region
gcp.expected: Critical buckets use MULTI_REGIONAL or DUAL_REGIONAL storage class
gcp.remediation: Configure multi-region or dual-region storage for critical buckets.

gcp.name: Cloud SQL instances have HA and cross-region replicas
gcp.expected: Critical Cloud SQL instances have cross-region read replicas
gcp.remediation: Configure cross-region read replicas for critical Cloud SQL instances.

aws.name: Application deployed to multiple regions
aws.expected: Load balancers exist in multiple regions for failover
aws.remediation: Deploy application infrastructure to multiple AWS regions.

aws.name: Route 53 health checks configured for failover
aws.expected: Health checks monitor critical endpoints with failover routing
aws.remediation: Configure Route 53 health checks and failover routing policies.

azure.name: Application deployed to multiple regions
azure.expected: Load balancers or Application Gateways exist in multiple regions
azure.remediation: Deploy application infrastructure to multiple Azure regions.

azure.name: Traffic Manager or Front Door configured for failover
azure.expected: Traffic Manager profiles with multiple endpoints for regional failover
azure.remediation: Configure Azure Traffic Manager or Front Door with multi-region endpoints.

gcp.name: Application deployed to multiple regions
gcp.expected: Managed instance groups exist in multiple regions
gcp.remediation: Deploy application infrastructure to multiple GCP regions.

gcp.name: Cloud Load Balancing configured with multi-region backends
gcp.expected: Backend services include instances from multiple regions
gcp.remediation: Configure Cloud Load Balancing with backends in multiple regions.

aws.name: AWS Backup vaults configured with backup plans
aws.expected: At least one backup vault exists with active backup plans
aws.remediation: Configure AWS Backup with vaults and backup plans for critical resources.

aws.name: RDS automated backups enabled
aws.expected: All RDS instances have automated backups enabled with retention >= 7 days
aws.remediation: Enable automated backups with minimum 7-day retention for all RDS instances.

aws.name: EBS snapshots scheduled for volumes
aws.expected: Regular EBS snapshots exist for critical volumes
aws.remediation: Configure automated EBS snapshot lifecycle policies for critical volumes.

aws.name: DynamoDB point-in-time recovery enabled
aws.expected: Point-in-time recovery enabled for all production DynamoDB tables
aws.remediation: Enable point-in-time recovery for all DynamoDB tables.

azure.name: Azure Backup configured for VMs
azure.expected: Critical VMs are protected with backup policies
azure.remediation: Configure Azure Backup for all critical virtual machines.

azure.name: SQL Database automated backups configured
azure.expected: All SQL databases have automated backups with retention >= 7 days
azure.remediation: Ensure Azure SQL databases have automated backups with appropriate retention.

azure.name: Storage account soft delete enabled
azure.expected: Blob soft delete enabled with retention >= 7 days
azure.remediation: Enable soft delete for Azure Storage blobs with appropriate retention period.

gcp.name: Compute Engine persistent disk snapshots scheduled
gcp.expected: Snapshot schedules exist for critical persistent disks
gcp.remediation: Configure snapshot schedules for critical Compute Engine persistent disks.

gcp.name: Cloud SQL automated backups enabled
gcp.expected: All Cloud SQL instances have automated backups enabled
gcp.remediation: Enable automated backups for all Cloud SQL instances.

gcp.name: Cloud Storage bucket versioning enabled
gcp.remediation: Enable object versioning for critical Cloud Storage buckets.

aws.name: AWS Backup restore jobs completed successfully
aws.expected: Recent test restore jobs show successful completion
aws.remediation: Regularly test backup restoration and document successful restores.

azure.name: Azure Backup restore jobs tested
azure.expected: Recent test restore operations completed successfully
azure.remediation: Regularly test Azure Backup restoration and document results.

gcp.name: Snapshot restore operations logged and verified
gcp.expected: Logs show successful snapshot restore testing
gcp.remediation: Regularly test snapshot restoration and log verification results.

aws.name: Backups replicated to alternate region
aws.expected: Backup vaults configured with cross-region copy
aws.remediation: Configure cross-region backup copy for AWS Backup vaults.

azure.name: Backup data replicated to separate region
azure.expected: Recovery Services vaults configured with GRS or cross-region replication
azure.remediation: Configure geo-redundant storage for Recovery Services vaults.

gcp.name: Snapshots stored in separate region
gcp.expected: Snapshots stored in multi-region or separate region from source
gcp.remediation: Store critical snapshots in separate regions from source resources.

aws.name: AWS Backup vault encryption enabled
aws.expected: All backup vaults encrypted with KMS keys
aws.remediation: Enable KMS encryption for all AWS Backup vaults.

aws.name: RDS backup encryption enabled
aws.remediation: Enable encryption for all RDS instances to ensure encrypted backups.

azure.name: Recovery Services vault encryption configured
azure.expected: Recovery Services vaults use customer-managed keys or platform encryption
azure.remediation: Configure encryption for Azure Recovery Services vaults.

gcp.name: Snapshots encrypted with Cloud KMS
gcp.expected: All snapshots encrypted with customer-managed or Google-managed keys
gcp.remediation: Ensure all snapshots are encrypted with Cloud KMS keys.

aws.name: System recovery procedures documented in Systems Manager
aws.expected: SSM documents exist for system recovery procedures
aws.remediation: Document system recovery procedures in AWS Systems Manager documents.

azure.name: Azure Site Recovery configured for critical VMs
azure.expected: Critical VMs protected with Site Recovery for disaster recovery
azure.remediation: Configure Azure Site Recovery for critical virtual machines.

gcp.name: Recovery procedures documented in Cloud Operations
gcp.expected: Recovery runbooks and procedures logged in Cloud Operations
gcp.remediation: Document system recovery procedures in Cloud Operations.

aws.name: RDS point-in-time recovery enabled
aws.expected: RDS instances have automated backups with point-in-time recovery
aws.remediation: Enable automated backups for transaction recovery on RDS instances.

azure.name: SQL Database point-in-time restore available
azure.expected: SQL databases support point-in-time restore for transaction recovery
azure.remediation: Ensure Azure SQL databases have automated backups for PITR.

gcp.name: Cloud SQL point-in-time recovery enabled
gcp.expected: Cloud SQL instances have binary logging enabled for PITR
gcp.remediation: Enable binary logging on Cloud SQL instances for point-in-time recovery.
